subprocess_flow.description: The Bid/RFP Manager compiles the Proposed AI Technical Architecture, Safety and Guardrail Specification, and Draft RFP Response into a standardized review package. This package is then distributed to the AI Solution Architect, Legal Lead, and Responsible AI Lead for parallel evaluation to ensure all reviewers have the same baseline information.
success_criteria: All reviewers confirm receipt of the complete package.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To initiate the parallel review process by providing all necessary documentation to stakeholders.
subprocess_flow.scope: Internal distribution to SME, Legal, and Ethics teams.
triggers: Completion of safety and guardrail design.
end_conditions: Reviewers have access to all materials.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Automated checklist in the Knowledge Management System.

subprocess_flow.description: The AI Solution Architect conducts a deep-dive review of the Proposed AI Technical Architecture to ensure it meets client performance requirements and is technically viable. This includes verifying that the agentic systems are correctly integrated with existing client infrastructure and that the proposed solution is scalable.
success_criteria: Technical architecture validated for scalability and performance.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To verify that the proposed AI architecture is technically sound and implementable.

subprocess_flow.description: The Legal Lead reviews the Draft RFP Response and Technical Architecture against international regulations such as the EU AI Act and GDPR. This audit ensures that all data handling and AI processing activities are legally compliant within the client's jurisdiction and that contractual risks are mitigated.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To ensure the proposal adheres to international and local data privacy and AI regulations.

subprocess_flow.description: The Responsible AI Lead evaluates the Safety and Guardrail Specification and Draft RFP Response for ethical risks, potential biases, and alignment with the firm's Responsible AI principles. This assessment focuses on transparency, fairness, and accountability of the agentic systems to prevent reputational damage.
success_criteria: Ethical risks identified and mitigated via guardrails.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To evaluate the proposal for ethical risks, bias, and alignment with corporate AI principles.

subprocess_flow.description: The Responsible AI / Legal Lead consolidates the Technical Feasibility Report, Legal Compliance Sign-off, and Ethical Review Approval. A final review is conducted to ensure all SME feedback has been addressed, culminating in the formal governance sign-off required for proposal submission.
success_criteria: Formal approval received from all required governance bodies.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To provide final authorization for the proposal content from the designated governance bodies.

step_risks_and_controls.risk: Reputational damage due to unethical AI implementation
step_risks_and_controls.control: Inclusion of a standardized 'Responsible AI' clause.

change_management.change_request_process: Formal change request to Bid Manager
